title: Browser
summary: A real web browser as tools (Microsoft's @playwright/mcp, full surface) with a human live-view/takeover page (noVNC) watching the same headed Chromium session.

secrets.label: Live-view VNC password
secrets.hint: Choose any passphrase; it gates the browser-view noVNC page. Leave unset to disable the live view entirely.

notes: Egress: this tool's squid listener allows ANY external HTTPS host (browsing is its job); private/link-local ranges stay denied.
Live view: https://browser-view.<domain>/vnc.html -- full mouse/keyboard takeover of the same session, guarded only by the VNC password above.
Image bundles Chromium and the X/VNC stack (~1.5GB); first build downloads the pinned browser build.
Screenshots/PDFs are image bytes the text guardrail cannot screen (accepted posture).
The Chromium profile persists in the state volume: sites you log into stay logged in for the agent.
